heading: Art. 93a. Prohibited activities with military recruit or trainee by person in position of special trust
label: 893a Art. 93a. Prohibited activities with military recruit or trainee by person in position of special trust
notes: Effective DateSection effective on , as designated by the President, with implementing regulations and provisions relating to applicability to various situations, see and Ex. Ord. No. 13825, set out as notes under .Jan. 1, 2019section 5542 of Pub. L. 114–328section 801 of this title

children.text: who is an officer, a noncommissioned officer, or a petty officer;
who is in a training leadership position with respect to a specially protected junior member of the armed forces; and
who engages in prohibited sexual activity with such specially protected junior member of the armed forces;

children.heading: .—Abuse of Position as Military Recruiter
children.label: b .—Abuse of Position as Military Recruiter

children.text: who is a military recruiter and engages in prohibited sexual activity with an applicant for military service; or
who is a military recruiter and engages in prohibited sexual activity with a specially protected junior member of the armed forces who is enlisted under a delayed entry program;

children.heading: .—Consent
children.label: c .—Consent
children.text: Consent is not a defense for any conduct at issue in a prosecution under this section (article).

children.heading: .—Specially protected junior member of the armed forces
children.label: 1 .—Specially protected junior member of the armed forces
A
children.text: a member of the armed forces who is assigned to, or is awaiting assignment to, basic training or other initial active duty for training, including a member who is enlisted under a delayed entry program;

children.label: B
children.text: a member of the armed forces who is a cadet, a midshipman, an officer candidate, or a student in any other officer qualification program; and

children.label: C
children.text: a member of the armed forces in any program that, by regulation prescribed by the Secretary concerned, is identified as a training program for initial career qualification.

children.label: A
children.text: Any drill instructor position or other leadership position in a basic training program, an officer candidate school, a reserve officers’ training corps unit, a training program for entry into the armed forces, or any program that, by regulation prescribed by the Secretary concerned, is identified as a training program for initial career qualification.

children.label: B
children.text: Faculty and staff of the United States Military Academy, the United States Naval Academy, the United States Air Force Academy, and the United States Coast Guard Academy.

children.heading: .—Applicant for military service
children.label: 3 .—Applicant for military service
children.text: The term “applicant for military service” means a person who, under regulations prescribed by the Secretary concerned, is an applicant for original enlistment or appointment in the armed forces.

children.heading: .—Military recruiter
children.label: 4 .—Military recruiter
children.text: The term “military recruiter” means a person who, under regulations prescribed by the Secretary concerned, has the primary duty to recruit persons for military service.

children.heading: .—Prohibited sexual activity
children.label: 5 .—Prohibited sexual activity
children.text: The term “prohibited sexual activity” means, as specified in regulations prescribed by the Secretary concerned, inappropriate physical intimacy under circumstances described in such regulations.
